title: Namespace
description: A Namespace groups Resources under a shared API path prefix. It maps from an Operational Domain.

name.description: The PascalCase name of the namespace.

path.description: The URL path prefix for all resources in this namespace.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what this namespace covers.

domain.description: The Operational Domain this namespace maps from.

resources.description: The Resources grouped under this namespace.
